rss_updates.title: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
rss_updates.summary: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.

rss_updates.summary: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.

summary:
## AI 模型与 API 变更报告 (2026-06-17)

本报告汇总了 OpenAI、Anthropic 和 Google Gemini 在模型与 API 方面的最新动态，旨在为开发者提供及时、专业的变更信息。

### OpenAI

#### 博客更新

**Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment**
OpenAI 引入了“部署模拟”（Deployment Simulation）方法，旨在通过模拟真实对话数据来预测 AI 模型在发布前的行为。这一新方法显著提升了模型安全性和评估的准确性，有助于在模型实际部署前发现并解决潜在问题。对于开发者而言，这意味着未来 OpenAI 模型在发布时可能具有更高的可靠性和安全性。
🔗 https://openai.com/index/deployment-simulation
